en-US.name: Tesla Personal Control
en-US.summary: Personal Tesla voice control for a private Alexa development skill.
en-US.description: Personal-use Alexa Custom Skill that sends selected Tesla vehicle commands through a self-hosted service using Tesla Fleet API and virtual-key authorization.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask Tesla to lock my car
Alexa, ask Tesla to start climate
Alexa, ask Tesla for vehicle status

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Personal development skill. Endpoint must be configured to the user's self-hosted HTTPS Alexa Tesla service.
